text: This fruit right here is known as ice cream bean. Ice cream bean trees are fast growing tropical fruit trees that are pretty rare to see back home in Florida, but here in Puerto Rico, there are quite a few. After making a small cut on the side of the fruit, all you have to do is twist it in order to reveal the fruit that's on the inside. This is the part that you actually eat and it's absolutely delicious. After removing one of the segments of fruit, you want to eat the flesh that surrounds the seed. Now that I have the seed removed, let's give it a try. Mmm, the texture is nice and soft, similar to a marshmallow, and it has a sweet flavor with a little hint of vanilla. There are many different kinds and varieties of ice cream bean out there, but I have to say this one is one of my favorites. I've had a couple different kinds of ice cream beans throughout the years, but this is definitely one of my favorites, so I'm going to be saving the seeds and bringing them back home to my garden to plant. These trees grow fast, and so in just about three to four years, it'll start producing fruit. And the other benefit of having one of these trees in your garden is that they actually fix the nitrogen within the soil, so they're really good for your other trees. So hopefully in a couple years, I'll have my own giant ice cream beans in my garden. I'll definitely be sure to make updates as these start to grow in the garden. And until next time, get outside and see what you can find.
